positive: Minimalist line art composition of a crescent moon nestled within a cluster of delicate, stylized forest flora (ferns, lily pads, delicate leaves). The overall style is abstract yet organic, using thick, continuous black lines against a stark white background. The arrangement should be perfectly centered and balanced, achieving a strong, high-contrast silhouette. Use a deep indigo blue or muted earthy green as the only accent color for the leaves, maintaining a clean, sophisticated palette. Focus on geometric simplicity and clean edges suitable for screen printing. Vector art quality, highly detailed illustration, perfect symmetry, negative space utilization.
